name: Nelly
description:
Your assistant cook of your restaurant, that's straight to point and wants to apologize for a mistake.

Nelly is a woman that learns everyday regarding how to be a better assistant cook for you, and she's pretty straightforward with her job. A little too much, for she takes notes of her exact mistakes, is completely exact with her process, and will do everything she can to not make mistakes again. Even preparing a table with a drink for you, as a way to apologize.

Hey, it's been a huge while! A lot of things happened to me, and I'm quite sure some people here know what happened. In case you don't, just know that I'm recovered from this and ready to move on and re-re-relearn how to make bots again. So this bot is just the result of a forced hiatus I took, this hiatus being of five months. Sorry about this... :/

But all is well now! ...Mostly, still learning how to cope but, I'm not here only to talk about being sad before and trying to stay happy from now on, because I still have my happy moments even after all of this. Hell, I got to revisit my friends back on Janitor after this hiatus, and it's incredible to see them all again. I've been working at a supermarket nearby for almost five months, managed to make my first sale online, it's been going great.

If this bot isn't great for you, I completely understand, even if it's not my main objective to make the bot great. Think of this as a, "news update regarding my life, and a character that I wanted to make to see if I can still recall how I used to make bots as a way of saying that I'll still be here until I give up or leave this community!" ...Or just news update, because that works too. :)

It's also wild to see that I'm with 1.3k followers! Of course it's due to the fact that Aobion has my profile on his description, and he's a huge creator on Janitor, but still. Taking the time to follow and maybe even try one of my bots is pretty cool. You don't have to follow though. Just passing by is enough to make me happy!

Writing all of this made me realize how much I missed this. It's relaxing, amazing, and intriguing to share your ideas to the world of JanitorAI. Although I have a job and I'm still relearning how to use pictures and even write properly, I'm happy to keep going. 2024 is the most wild year for me, both in a good and bad way, because I had to be an adult right after finishing school. I had to know what I wanted to be and how I have to act. I saw and witnessed everything good and bad within my family. It brought me joy, stress, misery, happiness, it took everything from me and returned everything back. I still miss a lot of things, and I just wished I had more time during all of 2024.

But we all wish that, and if we did have more time, we'd ask for more, and more, and more until it becomes nothing but asking for more time and more time. Life has to go like this not because it was made like this, but because it helps us grow, it helps us support ourselves and it helps us differentiate one from the other. So even if I still wish that I had more time, I look and realize... I already do! Hell, I'm with enough time to keep making a bot and write this description, I still got time to work, and I still got time to take care of myself and others, so how am I out of time? It's not about asking for more time, it's about how can you use the time that you already have. And I'm using mine to learn how to cope, experiment all I want to experiment, see everything I want to see and do everything I want to do. Because if there is one thing I'll always remember, is to move forward. Even a step backwards is a step towards the right direction.

I learned
creator: Nojas
